camera.name: RUBY LOCKHART AT ST. JOSEPH'S DR
camera.description: RUBY LOCKHART AT ST. JOSEPH'S DR

incident.why: Two passenger vehicles (a dark grey minivan/station wagon and a silver sedan) have collided. They are stopped in a collision configuration, and smoke is visible from the front of the silver sedan.
incident.actual_accident_verification_note: Both the unannotated image and video clip confirm a true accident. Image note: The image clearly shows two vehicles in a collision position with visible front-end damage to both, including a buckled hood on the silver car. There is also smoke or steam emanating from the front of the silver vehicle, providing strong evidence of a recent accident. Video note: The video clearly shows a black minivan colliding with a silver sedan. Upon impact, the silver sedan's hood crumples, and smoke is visible, indicating a clear accident with damage.

hazards.notes: Smoke is visible from the front of the silver sedan, indicating a potential engine issue or fluid leak.

lane_impact.lane_impact_notes: The two vehicles are positioned on a paved surface, effectively blocking at least one path of travel. The exact nature of 'lanes' in a highway context is unclear from the image, but the area of impact is obstructed.

location_in_view.location_statement: Incident involving two vehicles on a paved roadway with white markings, possibly a parking lot or intersection, within the central frame of view.

lane_blockage.evidence: Two vehicles are positioned in a collision blocking at least one traversable path on the paved surface.

vehicle_count.evidence: Two vehicles are involved in the collision.

vehicle_type.evidence: All involved vehicles are passenger vehicles (minivan/station wagon and sedan).

hazards.evidence: Smoke is clearly visible emanating from the front of the silver sedan.

vehicle_orientation.evidence: Both vehicles are upright but are angled relative to each other and the general direction of travel indicated by road markings.

damage_deformation.evidence: The silver sedan has significant crumpling and deformation of the front hood. The dark grey vehicle also shows impact damage to its front right side. No cabin deformation is visible.

debris_extent.evidence: No visible debris on the roadway.

image_verification.note: The image clearly shows two vehicles in a collision position with visible front-end damage to both, including a buckled hood on the silver car. There is also smoke or steam emanating from the front of the silver vehicle, providing strong evidence of a recent accident.

video_verification.note: The video clearly shows a black minivan colliding with a silver sedan. Upon impact, the silver sedan's hood crumples, and smoke is visible, indicating a clear accident with damage.
